SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_SEALED_BOOK_REL:
Whenever you play a Clow or Sakura Card, gain {ChargeGain} Magic Charge, or {PowerChargeGain} if it is a Power.
When you have at least {ExtraEffectCost} Magic Charge, your next eligible card spends {ExtraEffectCost} Magic Charge to activate its Extra Effect and enter its element state.
The Clow Cards wait in the sealed pages.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_SEALED_WAND_REL:
When a non-secondary enemy dies, gain {ChargeGain} charge. Gain {EliteBossExtraGain} additional charge in Elite and Boss rooms, and {SealExtraGain} additional charge if Seal dealt the killing damage.
At the start of the first turn after your charge reaches {TriggerThreshold}, spend {TriggerThreshold} charge and add {Cards} Turn to your hand.
Each Sakura card or Turn in your deck increases the charge required for your next Turn by {TriggerIncrease}.
Next convert needs {RemainingCharge} more charge.
A key-shaped wand that gathers the light needed to turn Clow into Sakura.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_STAR_WAND_RELIC:
Replaces Sealed Wand. When a non-secondary enemy dies, gain {ChargeGain} charge. Gain {EliteBossExtraGain} additional charge in Elite and Boss rooms, and {SealExtraGain} additional charge if Seal dealt the killing damage.
At the start of the first turn after your charge reaches {TriggerThreshold}, spend {TriggerThreshold} charge and add {Cards} Turn to your hand and deck.
Each Sakura card or Turn in your deck increases the charge required for your next Turn by {TriggerIncrease}.
If you also obtain Cerberus and Yue, replace them and this relic with Ultimate Wand.
Next convert needs {RemainingCharge} more charge.
Star power answers the new incantation, and the wand changes with it.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_ULTIMATE_WAND_R:
Automatically replaces Star Wand, Cerberus, and Yue when you collect all three.
When a non-secondary enemy dies, gain {ChargeGain} charge. Gain {EliteBossExtraGain} additional charge in Elite and Boss rooms, and {SealExtraGain} additional charge if Seal dealt the killing damage.
At the start of combat, if you have Sealed Book, gain {BattleStartMagicCharge} Magic Charge. For every {ElementTrigger} elemental Clow or Sakura cards you play, if you have Sealed Book, gain {ElementMagicCharge} Magic Charge.
At the start of your turn, upgrade {HandUpgrades} random card(s) in your hand and mark a random enemy. Marked enemies take {MarkDamageIncrease}% more attack damage until their turn starts.
At the start of the first turn after your charge reaches {TriggerThreshold}, spend {TriggerThreshold} charge and add {Cards} Turn to your hand. Each Sakura card or Turn in your deck increases the charge required for your next Turn by {TriggerIncrease}.
Next convert needs {RemainingCharge} more charge.
The powers of sun, moon, and stars meet in one wand.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_DARKNESS_WAND_R:
Gain {Energy} Energy.
Whenever a non-secondary enemy dies, your Sealed Wand, Star Wand, or Ultimate Wand gains {WandChargeGain} additional charge.
At the start of combat, all enemies gain {StrengthPower} Strength.
A wand created by Clow Reed and carried by Eriol Hiiragizawa, inheritor of his memories.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_SWORD_JADE_RELI: Release increases a card's non-damage, non-block numbers by {ReleasePercent}% instead of {BaseReleasePercent}%.
A jade pendant that carries the Li family's sword spirit.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_TEDDY_BEAR_RELI: Whenever you play a Spell other than Empty Spell, gain {Block} Block.
A handmade bear stitched with a wish to protect.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_ROLLER_SKATES_R: At the start of your turn, if you have less than {MaxDexterity} Dexterity, gain {DexterityGain} Dexterity.
They make every awkward dash look almost planned.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_TOUYAS_BICYCLE_: Whenever you exhaust a Void, if you have Sealed Book, gain {MagicCharge} Magic Charge.
Touya's bike keeps arriving exactly when Sakura needs to move.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_TAOIST_SUIT_REL: Every {Trigger} Clow or Sakura cards you play, add {Cards} Empty Spell to your hand.
Syaoran's battle clothes are cut for sharp steps and sharper spells.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_YUKITOS_BENTO_B: If you ended your last turn with 0 Energy, gain {Energy} Energy at the start of this turn.
Yukito packed enough for everyone, somehow.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_COMPASS_RELIC.d:
At the start of combat, choose up to {ChoiceLimit} of {Cards} random Clow cards to add to your hand and deck. It costs {CombatCost} this turn.
If you chose a card, add {VoidCount} Void to your discard pile.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_COMPASS_RELIC.f: The needle points toward a card before Sakura knows its name.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_GEM_BROOCH_RELI: Remove duplicate Clow Sword and Clow Shield cards from your deck, then upgrade the retained cards.
The scattered shape of Sword, gleaming with a will that can overwhelm its wearer.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_TOMOYOS_HEART_R: Every {Trigger} cards you exhaust, draw {Cards} card.
Tomoyo's camera sees courage before Sakura can.
At the start of combat, if you have Sealed Book, gain {BattleStartMagicCharge} Magic Charge.
At the start of your turn, mark a random enemy. Marked enemies take {MarkDamageIncrease}% more attack damage until their turn starts.
If you also obtain Star Wand and Yue, replace them and this relic with Ultimate Wand.
The guardian of the seal is small only when he wants snacks.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.title: Yue
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.descr:
For every {Trigger} elemental Clow or Sakura cards you play each turn, if you have Sealed Book, gain {MagicCharge} Magic Charge.
At the start of your turn, upgrade {Cards} random card in your hand.
If you also obtain Star Wand and Cerberus, replace them and this relic with Ultimate Wand.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.flavo: Moonlight answers only to judgment earned.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_MOON_BELL_RELIC:
Whenever you play a card with base cost {TriggerCost} or more, heal {Heal} HP.
The first time you would die, heal {DeathPreventHealPercent}% of your Max HP instead and add Turn to your hand and deck. Then this relic becomes used.
A bell from the moon shrine that rings only at the edge of loss.
